information_disclosure.description: XSLT injection for information disclosure -- inject XSLT elements to read files or extract server info via XML transformation

probes.description: XSLT vendor detection -- reveals processor (Xalan, Saxon, libxslt) for targeted attacks
XSLT file read via document() -- reads local files if not restricted by XSLT processor security policy

rce.description: XSLT injection for code execution -- use XSLT extension functions for arbitrary function calls

probes.description: PHP XSLT function call -- php:function() extension calls PHP functions if registerPHPFunctions() enabled. Safe detection via phpversion().
Java Xalan XSLT Runtime access -- confirms Xalan Java extension namespace allows Runtime object access. Prerequisite for RCE.

ssrf.description: XSLT SSRF -- use document() or unparsed-text() to make server-side requests to internal services

probes.description: XSLT SSRF via document() -- forces processor to fetch external URL, confirms OOB connectivity
